description_long: This object is a futuristic, tactical shotgun with a robust, angular design and a two-tone color scheme of matte black and tan. The upper receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, featuring a long, squared-off barrel shroud with subtle venting and a rail system for attachments. The grip is ergonomically shaped with a textured surface for secure handling, and the trigger guard is large and rounded for accessibility. A prominent under-barrel attachment, likely a tactical flashlight or laser module, is mounted beneath the barrel. The overall build suggests a modern, high-performance firearm designed for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a black and tan finish, angular barrel shroud, ergonomic grip, and an under-barrel attachment.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the angular barrel shroud, ergonomic grip, and the under-barrel attachment.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel shroud, and the sight alignment along the top rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the grip texture and attachment.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the width of the barrel shroud, the rail system, and the alignment of the under-barrel attachment.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a long, squared shroud and no visible ribbing or venting along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
